data.name: 醉醺醺 兔兔秘密花園
data.detailed_description:
※所有涉及性內容的人物都超過18歲。

※本作品中沒有 R18 元素。

＜概要＞

在華麗的夜晚後，兔女郎們的危險歸途即將開始！

令全世界的紳士們為之傾倒的《兔兔秘密花園》番外篇，以動作遊戲的形式驚喜登場！

操作因喝醉而搖搖晃晃、無法正常行走的「醉醺醺」服務員們，突破回家路上的重重危險！

你的使命，就是護送她們安全回家！

＜故事＞

為了撫慰紳士們每日疲憊心靈的樂園「兔兔秘密花園」，

這是在它營業時間結束後，所展開的另一段故事……。

今晚，花奈、凜、美羽香三人也如往常一樣，在兔兔秘密花園度過了愉快的時光。

只不過，這次她們似乎不小心喝得比平時稍微多了一點點。

腦袋昏昏沉沉，步伐也東倒西歪……。

即便如此，她們還是要回到家裡。

為了明天能再次帶著笑容迎接紳士們的到來。

然而，就在她們抱持著這樣的心情踏上歸途時，

各種突發狀況卻在回家的路上接踵而至！

花奈、凜、美羽香，3人究竟能否平安回到家中呢！？

＜系統＞

■喝到爛醉的服務員，究竟能否平安回到家中！？

玩家的任務，就是操縱搖搖晃晃的服務員，讓她安全回家！

在連直線都走不穩的「醉醺醺狀態」下，躲避潛藏在夜晚街頭的各種危險吧！

台階、汽車、自行車，還有五花八門的障礙物……以及莫名其妙就會變得破破爛爛的衣服……

一不小心不僅回不了家，甚至可能當場Game Over！？

服務員能否順利到家，全靠你的操作技術了！

■各種意外正在等著你

一頭栽進垃圾桶裡動彈不得、屁股卡在人孔蓋裡出不來……！？

回家的路上充滿了各種突發狀況！

克服接二連三襲來的麻煩，護送東倒西歪的服務員平安到家吧！

＜登場人物＞

・花奈　　(Voice :Mio Hoshitani）

・凜　　　(Voice :Eri Suzuki）

・美羽香　(Voice :Masumi Tazawa）

＜工作人員＞

・角色設計:Waon Inui

・故事設計:Takayoshi Muto(Synthese)

・企劃/執行:Yujiro Usuda

data.short_description: 令全世界的紳士們為之傾倒的《兔兔秘密花園》番外篇，以動作遊戲的形式驚喜登場！ 操作因喝醉而搖搖晃晃、無法正常行走的「醉醺醺」服務員們，突破回家路上的重重危險！ 你的使命，就是護送她們安全回家！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 or AMD equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 660 or AMD Radeon HD 7950
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible Sound Device
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-9400 over
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1080 Ti over
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible Sound Device

data.name: MERRY BUNNY GARDEN
data.detailed_description:
※All characters involved in sexual content are over the age of 18.

※There are no R18 elements in this work.

＜About＞

After their glamorous night, the bunnies begin their dangerous journey home!

A spin-off of the "Bunny Garden" that charmed gentlemen across the world, is available now as an action game!

Control "woozy" cast members who can't walk properly and return home avoiding dangers that await!

Your mission is to safely escort these "woozy" cast members home!

＜Story＞

"Bunny Garden", a paradise where gentleman can relax after daily fatigue.

This is another story that occurs after business hours...

Kana, Rin and Miuka had an amazing time at Bunny Garden tonight as per usual.

But it seems as though they had one too many drinks tonight.

So drunk to the point of their heads spinning, and not being able to stand straight...

But regardless of their condition, they had to go home.

They have to meet the gentlemen again tomorrow at Bunny Garden with smiles.

However, as if to shatter the girls' hopes and dreams,

tons of traps await on their way home!

Will Kana, Rin and Miuka be able to make it home safely tonight?!

＜System＞

■Will the woozy cast be able to return home safely?!

The player's mission is to guide the staggering cast safely back home!

Avoid all dangers lurking in the city at night, all while "woozy" where even walking straight is difficult!

Steps, cars, bicycles and various other obstacles... Not to mention your clothes getting ripped...

If you're not careful it might be Game Over before you know it!!

The cast's survival all depends on you!

■Happenings await!

Crashing into trash cans and getting stuck, falling butt first into manholes...

There are plenty of accidents on the way home!

Overcome the troubles that await you and return the staggering cast home safely!

＜CHARACTER＞

・Kana　　(Voice :Mio Hoshitani）

・Rin　　　(Voice :Eri Suzuki）

・Miuka　(Voice :Masumi Tazawa）

＜STAFF＞

・Character Design:Waon Inui

・Scenario:Takayoshi Muto（Synthese）

・Producer:Yujiro Usuda

English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 or AMD equivalent
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 660 or AMD Radeon HD 7950
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible Sound Device
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-9400 over
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1080 Ti over
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible Sound Device
